pnp:Preferences.Generator: City of South Fulton IT Department

pnp:ListInstance.Title: City Announcements
pnp:ListInstance.Description: Citywide announcements for the intranet home page.

pnp:ListInstance.Title: Department Directory
pnp:ListInstance.Description: All city departments — displayed as cards on the Departments page.

pnp:DataRow.pnp:Field: Public safety, law enforcement, crime prevention, and community policing.
Fire suppression, emergency medical services, hazmat response, and fire prevention.
Budget management, accounting, payroll, treasury, and financial reporting.
Purchasing, vendor management, contract administration, and competitive bidding.
Road maintenance, stormwater, sanitation, and infrastructure repair.
Planning, zoning, building permits, inspections, and economic development.
City parks, recreation programs, special events, and the Parks Master Plan.
Adjudication of ordinance violations, traffic citations, and code enforcement cases.
Official city records, council agendas, minutes, elections, and open records requests.
Legal counsel, contract review, litigation support, and legislative compliance.
Recruitment, employee relations, benefits administration, training, and workforce development.
City technology infrastructure, cybersecurity, help desk support, and digital transformation.
Public affairs, media relations, social media, branding, and internal communications.
Facilities management, city fleet, custodial services, records management, and purchasing.
Property maintenance standards, zoning compliance, abandoned vehicles, and nuisance abatement.
Annual budget preparation, performance management, strategic planning, and fiscal analysis.
Business attraction, retention, small business support, and South Fulton grant programs.
Disaster preparedness, EOC coordination, hazard mitigation planning, and community resilience.

pnp:ListInstance.Title: Intranet Quick Links
pnp:ListInstance.Description: Quick links shown on the home page.

pnp:ListInstance.Title: Intranet Footer Links
pnp:ListInstance.Description: Links shown in the site footer. Edit this list to update footer links without any code deployment.

pnp:CanvasControl.JsonControlData: {"id":"c4bd7b2f-7b6e-4599-8485-16504575f590","instanceId":"home-hero-01","title":"Hero","description":"Showcase important content","dataVersion":"1.4","properties":{"heroLayoutThreshold":640,"carouselLayoutMaxWidth":639,"layoutCategory":0,"layout":5,"content":[{"id":"1a2b3c4d-5e6f-7890-ab12-cd34ef567890","type":"UrlLink","title":"Welcome to the City of South Fulton Intranet","description":"Your hub for city resources, news, and department information.","url":"/SitePages/departments.aspx","imageUrl":"","imageSourceType":4,"altText":"City of South Fulton","showDescription":true,"callToAction":"Explore Departments","callToActionUrl":"/SitePages/departments.aspx"}]}}

{"id":"8c88f208-6c77-4bdb-86a0-0c47b4316588","instanceId":"home-news-01","title":"News","description":"Keep employees in the loop","dataVersion":"9.2","properties":{"layoutId":"FeaturedNews","dataProviderId":"News","emptyStateHelpItemsCount":1,"showNewsStateHelpItemsCount":1,"prefetchCount":4,"filters":[{"filterType":1,"value":""}],"webId":"","siteId":"","hubId":""}}

{"id":"c70391ea-0b10-4ee9-b2b4-006d3fcad0cd","instanceId":"home-ql-01","title":"Quick links","description":"Add links to important resources","dataVersion":"2.2","properties":{"items":[{"sourceItem":{"url":"/SitePages/hr-benefits.aspx","title":"Benefits Portal"},"thumbnailType":2,"id":1,"description":"","fabricReactIcon":{"iconName":"HeartFill"}},{"sourceItem":{"url":"/SitePages/it-helpdesk.aspx","title":"IT Help Desk"},"thumbnailType":2,"id":2,"description":"","fabricReactIcon":{"iconName":"Headset"}},{"sourceItem":{"url":"/SitePages/hr-policies.aspx","title":"Policy Library"},"thumbnailType":2,"id":3,"description":"","fabricReactIcon":{"iconName":"BookAnswers"}},{"sourceItem":{"url":"/SitePages/departments.aspx","title":"Staff Directory"},"thumbnailType":2,"id":4,"description":"","fabricReactIcon":{"iconName":"PeopleAdd"}},{"sourceItem":{"url":"https://workforcenow.adp.com","title":"Time & Attendance"},"thumbnailType":2,"id":5,"description":"","fabricReactIcon":{"iconName":"Clock"}}],"isMigrated":true,"layoutId":"CompactCard","shouldShowThumbnail":true,"hideWebPartWhenEmpty":false,"dataProviderId":"QuickLinks","webId":"","siteId":""}}

{"id":"c3d4e5f6-a7b8-9012-cdef-123456789012","instanceId":"depts-grid-01","title":"COSF Departments Grid","description":"Searchable card grid of all city departments","dataVersion":"1.0","properties":{"listName":"Department Directory","showSearch":true,"title":"All City Departments"}}

{"innerHTML":"

Overview

The City Manager's Office oversees the day-to-day operations of the City of South Fulton, implementing policy directives of the Mayor and City Council.

"}

{"innerHTML":"

Quick Links

  • Strategic Priorities
  • Memos & Directives
  • Budget Information
"}

{"innerHTML":"

Contact

City Manager's Office
City of South Fulton
5440 Fulton Industrial Blvd SW
Atlanta, GA 30336
(470) 809-7272

"}

{"innerHTML":"

Strategic Priorities

Add the City Manager's strategic priority documents and goals here. Use the SharePoint document library or embed a document from the Policy Library.

"}

{"innerHTML":"

Memos & Directives

Official communications from the City Manager's Office. Add a Document Library web part to display memos from SharePoint.

"}

{"innerHTML":"

Budget Information

City of South Fulton annual budget documents, presentations, and financial reports. Add a Document Library or Highlighted Content web part to display budget materials.

"}

{"innerHTML":"

Benefits

  • Health & Dental Insurance
  • Retirement / Pension
  • Employee Assistance Program
"}

{"innerHTML":"

Policies

  • Employee Handbook
  • Code of Conduct
  • Leave & Attendance
"}

{"innerHTML":"

Development

  • Training Calendar
  • Tuition Assistance
  • New Employee Onboarding
"}

{"innerHTML":"

Benefits & Enrollment

Information about employee health insurance, dental, vision, retirement plans, and enrollment periods. Contact HR at (470) 809-7740 for assistance.

"}

{"innerHTML":"

Policies & Employee Handbook

City of South Fulton employee policies, handbook, code of conduct, and workplace guidelines. Add a Document Library web part to display policy documents.

"}

{"innerHTML":"

Training & Development

Professional development opportunities, training calendar, tuition assistance, and leadership programs for City of South Fulton employees.

"}

{"innerHTML":"

Welcome to the City of South Fulton!

Everything new employees need to get started — ID badges, system access, benefits enrollment, and your first week checklist.

"}

{"innerHTML":"

Support

  • Submit a Help Desk Ticket
  • System Status
  • How-To Guides

Phone: (470) 809-7060

"}

{"innerHTML":"

Security

  • Security Policies
  • Password Reset
  • Report a Phishing Email
"}

{"innerHTML":"

Resources

  • Software Catalog
  • Remote Access / VPN
  • Microsoft 365 Training
"}

{"innerHTML":"

IT Help Desk

For immediate assistance call (470) 809-7060 or submit a ticket. Hours: Monday–Friday, 8 AM–5 PM.

"}

{"innerHTML":"

System Status

Real-time status of city systems and services. All systems operational unless noted here.

"}

{"innerHTML":"

IT Resources & Guides

Software catalog, remote access guides, Microsoft 365 tutorials, and equipment request forms. Add a Document Library web part to display IT guides.

"}

{"innerHTML":"

IT Security

Protecting city systems, data, and employees from cyber threats. Learn about password policies, phishing awareness, multi-factor authentication, and data classification.

"}

{"innerHTML":"

Resources

  • Brand Guidelines & Assets
  • Press Release Templates
  • Social Media Policy
  • Internal Communications
"}

{"innerHTML":"

Submit a Request

  • Communications Request Form
  • Media Inquiries
  • Request Design Help

Phone: (470) 552-4311

"}

{"innerHTML":"

Press & Media

Press release templates, media contact information, and guidance for handling media inquiries.

"}

{"innerHTML":"

Social Media Policy

Guidelines for City of South Fulton employees using social media. Add official social media policy document here.

"}

{"innerHTML":"

Brand Assets

Official City of South Fulton logos, color palette, fonts, and communication templates. All materials follow the 2024 Brand Guidelines. Add a Document Library web part to display brand assets.

"}

{"innerHTML":"

Internal Communications

Internal memos, city-wide announcements, and staff newsletter. Add a News or Highlighted Content web part to surface the latest communications.

"}

{"innerHTML":"

Submit a Communications Request

Need help with a press release, flyer, social post, or video? Submit a request and the Communications team will reach out within 2 business days.

Email: communications@cityofsouthfultonga.gov
Phone: (470) 552-4311

"}

{"innerHTML":"

Facilities

  • Submit a Work Order
  • Reserve a Conference Room
  • Building Access / Keys

Fleet

  • Vehicle Requests
  • Mileage & Fuel Logs
"}

{"innerHTML":"

Procurement

  • Purchase Requests
  • Vendor List
  • P-Card Policy

Records

  • Records Retention Schedule
  • Public Records Requests
"}

{"innerHTML":"

Facilities Management

Submit work orders, request building access, reserve conference rooms, and manage facilities requests. Contact General Services at (470) 809-7755.

"}

{"innerHTML":"

Fleet Management

City vehicle requests, mileage logs, fuel card policy, and preventive maintenance schedules.

"}

{"innerHTML":"

Purchasing & Vendors

Purchase requisitions, approved vendor list, P-Card policy, and competitive bidding requirements.

"}

{"innerHTML":"

Records Management

Georgia records retention schedules, public records request procedures, and document management guidelines for City of South Fulton departments.

"}
